title: Iran Has Fired Widely Banned Cluster Munitions at Israel
summary_full: Accounts from Israeli officials and footage verified by The New York Times show that Iran has targeted Israel with the weapons. Experts say this has exposed civilians to indiscriminate attacks.
summary_public: Accounts from Israeli officials and footage verified by The New York Times show that Iran has targeted Israel with the weapons. Experts say this has exposed civilians to indiscriminate attacks.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran has targeted Israel with the weapons.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has targeted Israel with the weapons.
